revision.comment: same as <nobr>
revision.text: {{{1}}}

revision.comment: cat
revision.text: {{{1}}} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates]]
{{{1}}} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|N]]
{{{1}}} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Nobr]]

revision.comment: better cat sort
revision.text: {{{1}}} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: /doc
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{/doc}}

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Nobr]] to [[Template:Nowrap]]: Slightly less cryptic; also indicates the "nowrap" the template uses
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{/doc}}

revision.comment: {{protected template}} as this utility template otherwise vulnerable, <includeonly>, +category
revision.text: {{protected template}}{{{1}}} {{/doc}} [[Category:Wikipedia utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Protected Template:Nowrap: the below, take 2 [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text: {{protected template}}{{{1}}} {{/doc}} [[Category:Wikipedia utility templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: rm category
revision.text: {{protected template}}{{{1}}} {{/doc}}

revision.comment: rm unneeded semicolon
revision.text: {{protected template}}{{{1}}} {{/doc}}

revision.comment: no need for two <noinclude>s.
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{protected template}} {{/doc}}

revision.comment: making changes per talk page request
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: {{documentation}}, moved some content to subpage
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: shorten per talk
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: closing colon
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: use nowrap class
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Adapt comment; edits inside noinclude blocks should not affect job queue, but won't kill parser either way.
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Nowrap]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{{1}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
